headline: Honda posted its first-ever loss. Here's what happened.
summary: Honda (HMC) stock is in focus after the company posted its first-ever loss. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian breaks down the details.

headline: Here's What's Driving Ford's Guidance Hike -- and What Isn't.
summary: Ford raised its guidance after a solid first quarter, and there's more suggesting there's near-term upside for the stock.

headline: Ford Stock Is Ripping Again. Suddenly, It’s a AI Data Center Stock.
summary: Ford Motor  investors have caught AI-fever, and shares of the auto maker just won’t stop.  It seemed to be tied to Ford Energy, which the company unveiled earlier in the week.  The new business will use Ford’s lithium-ion battery capacity to build storage systems for utilities and data centers in the U.S.

headline: Ford Zooms 8% Higher, Easily Outpaces General Motors and Tesla
summary: Shares of Ford (NYSE:F) are up 8% on Thursday morning, trading near $14.60 after closing yesterday at $13.57. The move extends a second straight session of decisive outperformance versus the Detroit and Austin peers. For context, Ford stock climbed 6% yesterday, and the two-day rip has been decisive. Ford’s market cap sits near $57 billion, ... Ford Zooms 8% Higher, Easily Outpaces General Motors and Tesla

headline: GM’s Data-Privacy Settlement and AI Pivot Might Change The Case For Investing In General Motors (GM)
summary: Earlier this week, General Motors agreed to pay US$12.75 million to settle California allegations that it unlawfully collected and sold OnStar drivers’ location and driving data, while separately cutting more than ten percent of its IT workforce to refocus on AI and software capabilities. The settlement’s five-year ban on selling driving data to consumer reporting agencies and the IT overhaul both raise fresh questions about how GM balances data monetization, privacy compliance and...
